ab: camak madraudraw a kemacu ta tingnaw ken, dikilu sun a pasedjam tjanuaken?
ch: w:camak，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: camak, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: neka niaken tauta, aicu ni muni.
en: I don’t have one either. This is muni’s.

ab: dikilu pasedjam tjanuaken a palamu? djaljaw ki u pacikely tjanusun.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: ui, alapu.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: masalu, pusaladji anga ken a pasemalaw tjai muni tu masalu.
en: Thank you and thank muni for me.

ab: anemanan su kinasaljinga?
en: May I help you?

ab: uli pacikel aken tua aicu a drusa sapitj.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: ui, uli saljinganan sun ta anema?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: tiaken uli kisedjam anan ta aicu tjelu a sapitj.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: ui, nusikatjelu anga paqenetju a pacikel.
ch: A:好了，記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: inianan pacikel sun ta ku siquluqulip.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: katiaw u pinacikel anga.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: aza ku siquliqulip manu mainu maulav anga.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: su sinipasedjam tjai camak anga.
en: Did you lend it to camak?

ab: ika ken kemeljang. u vaiki a kivadaq timadju.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: pasedjamay anan sun ta u siquliqulip.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: muni, ti camak a na pasedjam tjanusun tucu a tjiaku?
en: muni, did camak lend you this coat?

ab: ini, aicu na u kina vinelian tjanuaken.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: mamaw tjiaku kati camak.
en: camak’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: a nimadju tjiaku qecengecengel, ika mamaw niamen quljaw.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: muni, na kisedjam sun ta paisu ni camak?
en: muni, did you borrow money from camak?

ab: izua, uli pacikeleng angata kasauny tjaimadju, ljakua madraudraw a kemacu ta paisu.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: sa nungida uli su pacikeleng?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: nutiaw u pacikelaw anga tjaimadju.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: ui, u pusaladjay sun a pasemalav tjai camak.
en: Okay, I will tell camak for you.
